{{Quote|This is Mayvitch Seven! We need help! If you receive this transmis skvt... tact the Senate--warn them about the Yinchoreeeee|Last transmission from Immalian officer to [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]] before his death|<ref name="Jedi Council: Acts of War 1">[[Jedi Council: Acts of War 1|''Jedi Council: Acts of War'' 1]]</ref>}}
The '''Battle of Mayvitch 7''' was one of the first battles of the [[Yinchorri Uprising]] of [[33 BBY/Legends|33 BBY]]. Mayvitch 7 was settled by [[Human/Legends|Human]] colonists from [[Immalia]] to defend their mining operations from pirates.

==The battle==
[[File:Mayvitch_soldier_contacting_Jedi.jpg|thumb|left|A soldier on [[Mayvitch 7]] contacting the [[Jedi Council/Legends|Jedi Council]]]]

During the battle, [[Yinchorri attack ship]]s descended on the surface of [[Mayvitch 7]], one of the planet [[Amador]]'s moons in the [[Chalenor system]]. The [[Yinchorri/Legends|Yinchorri]] quickly decimated the defenses on the moon. The colonists attempted to launch [[Starfighter/Legends|fighters]], though these too were destroyed.

A Mayvitch soldier contacted the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] and alerted them to the danger of the Yinchorri. However, it only reached the Jedi Temple four standard days later. By then, the Yinchorri had taken the moon and presumably, the Chalenor system.
